headline: Is NetApp (NTAP) Offering Value After Recent Pullback In Data Storage Leader’s Shares
summary: If you are wondering whether NetApp is attractively priced or starting to look stretched, you are not alone; the stock raises some clear valuation questions that are worth unpacking. NetApp last closed at US$96.93, with returns of 9.9% over 1 year, 66.9% over 3 years and 55.2% over 5 years, alongside recent pullbacks of 5.1% over 7 days, 8.2% over 30 days and 9.0% year to date that may be changing how investors think about risk and reward. Recent news coverage around NetApp has continued to...
